(paraphrased) However, in this specific verse , the direct translation that best captures the intent of the original Greek would be: Repent, for the kingdom of heaven is at hand. Who has shown you to flee from the coming wrath? The phrase "Even snakes' offspring" serves as a rhetorical question and metaphor in the original context, but it can be removed without significantly altering the meaning when translating directly.
verses.kjv: Then said he to the multitude that came forth to be baptized of him, O generation of vipers, who hath warned you to flee from the wrath to come?
